promotionDelta: Generate and verify package, registry, documentation, and public subpath outputs.
Pass packed consumers and package/source parity.
Verify keyboard accessible drop mode plus picker, paste, mouse drag, touch fallback, nested-drag, disabled, busy, and latest-request behavior in every supported browser engine.
Verify bounded type, size, count, directory, unreadable, and unsupported-item rejection plus accepted-only native FormData synchronization without implicit upload.
Record LTR, RTL, 320 CSS pixel, zoom, text-spacing, reduced-motion, enhanced-contrast, forced-colors, and current risk-class manual assistive-technology evidence.
Publish an approved immutable Quality Passport.
